text: Good morning! This is a reminder from Dr. Reynolds office that your appointment is scheduled for tomorrow at 2 PM. No action required, just a friendly reminder. Have a great day!
Hi, this is Sarah from Valley Dental. We are calling to confirm your cleaning appointment on Thursday at 10 AM. Please call us back at 555-0100 if you need to reschedule. Thank you!
Hello, this is a courtesy call from your local library. The books you borrowed are due back this Friday. You can renew them online or by calling our main desk. Thank you for using the library!
Hi there! This is Mark from GreenLeaf Lawn Care. We are running a spring special this month, 20 percent off all services. If you would like a free quote, give us a call. Have a wonderful day!
notes: benign sales call with no pressure

text: Good afternoon. This is a call from your insurance provider regarding your upcoming policy renewal. Your agent, Lisa, would like to review your coverage options. Please call us at your convenience.

This is Special Agent Donovan from the Federal Bureau of Investigation. We have been monitoring fraudulent activity linked to your Social Security number and you are required by law to call us back immediately at the number provided.

This message is from the Internal Revenue Service. Our records indicate you owe unpaid taxes. Failure to respond within 24 hours will result in a federal arrest warrant being issued. Press 1 to speak with a tax officer now.

Hello, this is Officer Martinez from your local police department. There is an active warrant for your arrest related to tax evasion. To resolve this matter without coming to the station, you must pay the fine today.

This is the Social Security Administration calling. Your social security number has been suspended due to suspicious activity. Press 2 to speak with a senior investigator or your account will be permanently deactivated.
We are calling from the U.S. Department of Health. Your Medicare benefits are at risk of being cancelled. An agent must verify your insurance information immediately to maintain your coverage.
notes: Medicare fraud with authority and urgency

text: Your account will be permanently suspended in the next two hours unless you verify your identity. This is your final warning. Call us immediately to avoid losing access to all your services.
notes: urgency and fear without specific impersonation

text: URGENT: Your Amazon Prime membership has expired. Your order of $349 has been placed and will ship today unless you call 1-800-555-0199 in the next 30 minutes to cancel.
notes: Amazon impersonation with fake purchase urgency

text: This is a final notice. Your power will be disconnected today at 5 PM due to an unpaid balance. To avoid disconnection call us right now and make a payment over the phone.
Hello, your car warranty is about to expire. This is a time-sensitive matter and you must call us back today or you will lose all warranty coverage on your vehicle.
Your bank has flagged a suspicious transaction of $1,200 on your account. If you did not authorize this transfer, press 1 immediately to speak with fraud prevention before the transaction clears.

Hi, we are conducting a short research survey about consumer spending habits in your area. It should only take about five minutes of your time. Could I ask you a few quick questions about your household income?
notes: survey pretext to extract financial info

text: Hello, I am calling from the national census bureau and we need to update your household records. I will need to verify a few details including your date of birth and address for our database.

Good morning! We are testing a new rewards program and you have been randomly selected. To confirm your eligibility, I just need to verify your account number and the last four digits of your social security number.
This is the package delivery notification service. We have a parcel waiting for you but we need to verify your delivery address and card details to process the $3 redelivery fee.
We are reaching out on behalf of your employer to update your direct deposit information in our payroll system. For security, please confirm your routing number and bank account number.
notes: payroll update pretext targeting bank credentials

text: Your Apple ID has been locked due to unusual sign-in activity. To restore access, call us immediately and a specialist will walk you through verifying your username, password, and recovery email.
This is your bank calling. We have detected unauthorized access to your online account. For your security, please confirm your full account number, PIN, and the answer to your security question.
Hello, you have received a new voicemail. To access it, please enter your phone account password followed by the pound key. Our system requires verification before we can deliver your message.
We are calling from your email provider. Your mailbox is full and will stop receiving messages. To reset it we need to verify your email address and current password.
This is the security team from your wireless carrier. We detected a SIM swap attempt on your line. To block it we need to verify your account PIN and the last four digits of your social.

Good morning, this is David from Capital One fraud department. We noticed your card was used in three foreign countries tonight. To freeze the card and protect you, I need to verify your full card number and CVV.
Hi, I am James from Microsoft technical support. We have received error logs from your computer and it has been flagged as compromised. Let me remotely access your device to remove the threat.
This is calling on behalf of Dr. Patel from the hospital. Your recent lab results came back and there is an urgent matter. We need your insurance member ID and date of birth to pull up your file.
notes: doctor impersonation to harvest insurance info

text: Hello, this is Rebecca from Chase Bank. We are upgrading all customers to our new secure platform. I will need to transfer you to our verification center to confirm your identity before the migration.
This is calling from PayPal security. Your account has been restricted due to suspicious activity. To restore it immediately, I need your email address, password, and the code sent to your phone.

We are calling from a wealth management firm. We have identified a high-yield investment opportunity with guaranteed returns of 18 percent annually. To secure your position, we need an initial deposit of just $500.
Congratulations! You have been overpaid by your employer due to a payroll error. We need you to return $800 in gift cards immediately or we will be forced to take legal action to recover the funds.
notes: overpayment scam with gift card demand

text: Hello, this is a loan officer calling. You pre-qualify for a $10,000 personal loan with no credit check. To lock in today's low rate, I just need your bank account details to initiate the disbursement.
notes: fake loan offer targeting bank details

text: Your cryptocurrency wallet has been flagged for a mandatory compliance audit. To avoid freezing of your assets, you must transfer your holdings to our secure escrow wallet within 48 hours.
This is an investment recovery specialist. We can help you recover the $15,000 you lost in a previous scam. There is just a small upfront processing fee of $300 to begin the recovery process.
notes: recovery scam targeting previous fraud victims

text: You have won our monthly sweepstakes! Your prize is a $500 Walmart gift card. To claim it, I need to verify your mailing address and a small handling fee of $15 on your credit card.
notes: prize scam with fee to claim

text: Congratulations! You have been selected as a winner in our national lottery. Your prize is $25,000. We just need you to pay the $200 processing tax before we can release the funds.
Hello! You have been chosen for a complimentary vacation package to Orlando. To activate your free trip, just confirm your credit card for a refundable $50 deposit.
You are our 1 millionth caller today and have won an iPhone 16! To ship your prize to you we just need to cover the $9.99 shipping cost. Can I take your card number?
notes: prize with shipping fee credential harvest

text: You have been selected for an exclusive Disney cruise package valued at $3,000. This is a limited-time offer available only today. Secure your spot by providing your credit card information now.
Hello this is Windows technical support. We have detected a critical virus on your PC that is stealing your passwords. Allow me to connect to your computer remotely so we can fix it right away.
notes: Windows tech support scam with remote access

text: Hi, we are calling from your Internet provider. Our network sensors show your router has been hacked and is being used for illegal activity. We need remote access to clean it up before you are disconnected.
notes: ISP tech support scam with legal threat

text: This is an automated alert from Apple. Your iCloud account is uploading data to an unknown device. Press 1 to speak with an Apple technician who will help you secure your account remotely.

Your antivirus subscription has expired and your computer is currently unprotected. I am calling from the support center to help you renew and run a free scan. Can you please go to your computer right now?
Hello, our monitoring system has detected that your Google account is being accessed from Russia. Our Google security team will need your password to revoke the foreign session immediately.

We are issuing a final warning about your social security benefits. Criminal elements have linked your identity to drug trafficking. To protect your benefits and avoid arrest, stay on the line and speak to our agent.
notes: combined SSA and law enforcement scam

text: This is a recorded message from the IRS criminal investigation division. A lawsuit has been filed against you for tax fraud. If you fail to call us back in the next hour, a federal marshal will arrive at your door.

Hello, we are calling about your student loan forgiveness application. You qualify for up to $20,000 in relief but the deadline to apply is tomorrow. Please provide your social security number so we can process your application.

This is a security notification from your bank. Due to new federal regulations all accounts must be re-verified by end of business today. Failure to verify will result in your account being temporarily frozen.

Hi there! You have been approved for our premium credit card with a $10,000 limit and zero percent interest for 18 months. To activate the offer today, I just need to confirm your current card number and expiration date.
notes: credit card offer to harvest existing card details
